title: solanum sessiliflorum var. georgicum
intro: Solanum sessiliflorum var. georgicum, also known as Georgian horse nettle, is a plant species within the Solanum genus. It is native to the southeastern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Georgian horse nettle include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
